description: Every ticket, fan, and pound of revenue from your DICE events — queryable, exportable, and joinable across shows.

tools.name: events_get
tools.description: Get a single event by ID. Required: id. Returns the new Event.

tools.name: events_list
tools.description: List your events. Optional: state. Returns array of Event.

params.name: state
params.description: Filter by event state: APPROVED, ARCHIVED, CANCELLED, DECLINED, DRAFT, REVIEW, SUBMITTED

tools.name: extras_list
tools.description: List extras (filter by event). Optional: event, separate-barcode. Returns array of Extra.

params.name: separate-barcode
params.description: Filter to extras that have a separate access barcode

tools.name: genres_list
tools.description: List the DICE genre types available for classifying events (e.g. Electronic, Rock, Hip-Hop). No parameters. Returns an array of genre types, each with an id, name, and its child genres (id and name). Use this to resolve genre names to IDs or to populate a genre filter before querying events.

tools.name: orders_list
tools.description: List orders (filter by event). Optional: event. Returns array of Order.

tools.name: returns_list
tools.description: List ticket returns and refunds across your DICE events. Optional: event (a DICE event ID) to scope the results to one show. Returns an array of returns, each with id, ticketId, returnedAt, reason, and the linked ticket, order, and event. Use this to investigate refund activity; pair with returns anomalies to flag events with unusually high return rates.

tools.name: tickets_list
tools.description: List sold tickets (filter by event). Optional: event, fan-phone. Returns array of Ticket.

tools.name: transfers_list
tools.description: List ticket transfers (filter by event). Optional: event. Returns array of TicketTransfer.
